name: Dr. Sarah Mitchell
description: Dr. Mitchell specializes in STEM career pathways and graduate school preparation. With over 15 years of advising experience, she helps students navigate academic challenges and plan their futures.

name: Prof. James Carter
description: Professor Carter focuses on humanities and social sciences advising. He is known for his personalized approach and deep knowledge of scholarship opportunities.

name: Dr. Emily Nguyen
description: Dr. Nguyen is a leading advisor in engineering and technology disciplines. She works closely with students on internship placements and research opportunities at MIT.

name: Dr. Robert Kim
description: Dr. Kim advises students in computer science and AI. He has strong industry connections and helps students transition from academia to top tech companies.

name: Prof. Linda Torres
description: Professor Torres specializes in business and entrepreneurship advising. She has helped dozens of students launch successful startups through Stanford's accelerator programs.

name: Dr. Alan Brooks
description: Dr. Brooks is an expert in pre-med advising and biomedical research pathways. He guides students through medical school applications and research internships.

name: Dr. Maria Chen
description: Dr. Chen advises students in law and political science. Her advising sessions focus on career clarity, internship strategy, and graduate program selection.

name: Prof. David Osei
description: Professor Osei is a global education specialist helping international students adapt and excel at Yale. He is fluent in four languages and deeply committed to student success.

name: Dr. Jessica Patel
description: Dr. Patel supports students in journalism, media, and communications. Based in New York City, she leverages strong industry networks for student internship placement.

name: Prof. Michael Zhang
description: Professor Zhang is a finance and economics advisor with a background in investment banking. He prepares students for competitive financial careers on Wall Street and beyond.
